languages.text: "Ты чего, совсем одурел?! Чтобы наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана и не мог{mf||ла}?!"
"Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"
languages.original_text: "Ты чего, совсем одурел?! Чтобы наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана и не мог{mf||ла}?!"

traits.locale_text: "Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"
"Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"
"Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"
"Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"

languages.text: “你疯了吗？居然敢质疑塞贝里安的继承人？”
languages.original_text: "Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: “你疯了吗？居然敢质疑塞贝里安的继承人？”

languages.text: "Aklını mı kaçırdın? Seberian'ın vârisinden şüphe etmeye nasıl cüret edersin?"
languages.original_text: "Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: "Aklını mı kaçırdın? Seberian'ın vârisinden şüphe etmeye nasıl cüret edersin?"

languages.text: « Ça va pas la tête ? Tu oses douter de l'{mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian ? »
languages.original_text: "Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: « Ça va pas la tête ? Tu oses douter de l'{mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian ? »

languages.text: «¿Estás mal de la cabeza? ¿Te atreves a dudar de{mf|l| la} hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian?».
languages.original_text: "Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Estás mal de la cabeza? ¿Te atreves a dudar de{mf|l| la} hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian?».

languages.text: "Hast du den Verstand verloren? Du wagst es, an Seberians {mf|Erben|Erbin} zu zweifeln?"
languages.original_text: "Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: "Hast du den Verstand verloren? Du wagst es, an Seberians {mf|Erben|Erbin} zu zweifeln?"

languages.text: 「正気か？ セベリアンの後継者を疑うというのか？」
languages.original_text: "Are you out of your mind? You dare doubt the heir of Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: 「正気か？ セベリアンの後継者を疑うというのか？」
